title: Back-Rank Checkmate
description: Black has neglected their back rank security. Capitalize on the blunder!

title: Philidor's Legacy (Smothered Mate)
description: The black king is completely trapped by its own pieces. Sacrifice the Queen to force checkmate!

title: Légal's Mate Trap
description: Black pinned your knight but left their king vulnerable. Unleash a brilliant Queen sacrifice!

title: Rook Deflection
description: Black's rook moved away from defense. Deliver checkmate on the back rank!

title: Scholar's Mate Trap
description: A classic trap. Black played a quiet pawn move instead of defending the f7 square.

title: Queen Fork
description: Black grabbed a central pawn, but left their knight unprotected and exposed their king.

title: Pawn-Winning Simplification
description: Black attacked your bishop. Trade off pieces and win a central pawn.

title: Damiano's Pawn Trap
description: Black tried to defend their e5 pawn with f6. Punish them with a knight sacrifice that wins the rook!

title: Back-Rank Deflection
description: The black rook left the back rank undefended. Checkmate the king!

title: Quiet Blunder Punishment
description: Black's rook moved to attack your pawn, ignoring the threat. Mate the king on the back rank!
